headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Welltower (WELL) After Strong Multi Year Rally?
summary: Wondering if Welltower at US$205.33 is offering fair value or a stretched price? This article walks through the key valuation angles so you can judge for yourself. The stock is up 9.8% year to date and 35.1% over the past year, although it has recently fallen 5.0% over the last week and 3.2% over the past month. Recent headlines have focused on Welltower's position as a major health care real estate owner, with investors watching how sector sentiment and capital flows affect large REITs...
